name: Sesame Turkey & Broccoli Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound turkey breast, cut into 1-inch-wide strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet, heat sesame seeds over medium heat, shaking the pan and stirring often until seeds are just golden brown. Remove seeds to a small bowl and set aside.
2. In the same skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add turkey and garlic; cook 2 minutes, or until lightly browned, stirring constantly. Add broccoli, green onion, chicken broth, soy sauce, and pepper flakes (if using). Cook 3 minutes, or until broccoli is tender-crisp, stirring often.
3. Arrange lettuce on a serving platter or divide among individual plates. Top with the turkey mixture, sprinkle with sesame seeds, and serve immediately.
